raw: {"perspective": "CTO Watchdog", "findings": [{"severity": "major", "file_or_area": "project_v0laura_vision.md", "issue": "v0Laura vision not consistently applied across products", "recommended_fix": "Re-verify product alignment with v0Laura architecture in next planning cycle"}, {"severity": "minor", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/lessons.md", "issue": "Class 20 lesson indicates potential for inherited fabrication in briefs", "recommended_fix": "Implement verify-before-save gate for all briefs to prevent fabrication"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}
